member.name: T:VL.OCIO.ColorCorrectionSettings
member.summary: Settings for HDR color correction shader. All values map directly to shader parameters. Use Split() to extract individual values for vvvv shader pins.
Split settings into individual out parameters matching shader input order. Use directly with vvvv nodes for HDRGrade_TextureFX or HDRGrade_Tonemap_TextureFX.

member.name: T:VL.OCIO.Vector3Json
member.summary: JSON-serializable Vector3 (Stride Vector3 doesn't serialize well). Internal properties — not exposed to vvvv node graph.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.Vector3Json.ToVector3
member.summary: Convert to Stride Vector3

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.Vector3Json.FromVector3(Stride.Core.Mathematics.Vector3)
member.summary: Create from Stride Vector3

member.name: T:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingInstance
member.summary:
Represents a single color grading instance that can be controlled via the web UI. The service starts automatically — just place this node and the web UI becomes available.
Settings are persisted as a JSON dictionary in the "Settings" Create pin (constructor parameter), keyed by stable instance ID (deterministic hash of path stack + auto-assigned slice index). This supports multiple runtime instances from the same physical node (e.g. inside a loop). Slice indices are auto-managed: vvvv creates instances in deterministic order, so slice 0 always gets index 0, slice 1 gets index 1, etc. On restart the same mapping holds.
In editor mode, the service calls SetPinValue (DontCompile) to persist changes + SetRuntimeState for immediate output. In exported mode, the service uses JSON files + SetRuntimeState for immediate output.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingInstance.#ctor(VL.Core.NodeContext,System.String)
member.summary: Create a color grading instance. Slice index is auto-assigned based on creation order within the same node path. Works correctly inside ForEach loops — each slice gets a unique, stable identity.
member.param: Injected by vvvv
Persisted settings JSON (managed automatically)

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingInstance.Update(VL.OCIO.ColorCorrectionSettings@,VL.OCIO.TonemapSettings@,System.String@,System.String@,System.Int32@,System.String@,System.String@,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Main update method called every frame by VVVV. The "Settings" Create pin (constructor) holds a JSON dictionary keyed by stable instance ID. The service updates this pin via SetPinValue (DontCompile) when settings change in the web UI. Runtime state (from SetRuntimeState) provides immediate output updates without node recreation.
member.param: Output: effective color correction settings
Output: effective tonemap settings
Output: the actual instance ID being used
Output: URL to reach the color grading web UI
Output: number of connected web UI clients
Output: current effective settings as a JSON string
Output: error message if something fails (empty when ok)
Custom instance ID (empty = auto-generated from patch path)
Make the grading UI accessible on the local network (requires one-time admin permission)
Automatically open the web UI in the default browser
JSON string to load as new settings (use with Apply Settings)
When true, parses the Settings JSON and applies it to this instance

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingInstance.SetRuntimeState(VL.OCIO.ColorCorrectionSettings,VL.OCIO.TonemapSettings,System.String)
member.summary: Called by the service to set runtime state that overrides Create pin defaults. Internal: only used by ColorGradingService, must not appear as a vvvv pin.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingInstance.ClearRuntimeState
member.summary: Clear runtime state, reverting to Create pin defaults. Internal: only used by ColorGradingService.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingInstance.GetNodeStack
member.summary: Get the node stack for SetPinValue operations (editor mode).

member.name: P:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingInstance.StableId
member.summary: The stable ID for this instance (deterministic hash of path stack + slice index).

member.name: P:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingInstance.IsExported
member.summary: Whether this instance is running in exported (standalone) mode.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingInstance.ParseMySettings(System.String)
member.summary: Parse settings from the Create pin JSON string. Tries dictionary format first (keyed by stable ID), then legacy single-object format.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingInstance.ComputeStableId(System.Collections.Immutable.ImmutableStack{VL.Core.UniqueId},System.Int32)
member.summary: Compute a stable, deterministic instance ID from the node's path stack and slice index. Path stack identifies the node in the document (same for all loop iterations). Slice index differentiates loop slices (auto-assigned by creation order). UniqueIds are document-stored GUIDs, so the hash is stable across sessions. Uses FNV-1a hash for determinism (no runtime randomization like string.GetHashCode).

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingInstance.StackToString(System.Collections.Immutable.ImmutableStack{VL.Core.UniqueId})
member.summary: Convert an ImmutableStack to a string key for path-based grouping.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingInstance.GenerateFriendlyId(VL.Core.NodeContext,System.Int32)
member.summary: Generate a friendly display name from the patch path. Uses GetCallingPatches() to get the parent patch names. Skips "ColorGrading" suffix. Falls back to app name. For looped nodes (sliceIndex > 0), appends the index for clarity.

member.name: T:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService
member.summary: Per-app singleton service for the color grading web UI. Manages the WebSocket server, HTTP file serving, instance registry, and presets. Acquired via GetOrCreate(AppHost) — users never see this; they only place ColorGradingInstance nodes.

member.name: P:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.ActualPort
member.summary: Public read-only properties for diagnostic outputs on ColorGradingInstance.

member.name: T:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.RegisteredInstance
member.summary: Represents a registered color grading instance with its state and node reference.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.ForceCleanup
member.summary: Forcefully cleanup all resources synchronously (for process exit).

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.EnsureServerStarted
member.summary: Start the server lazily on first instance registration.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.EnableNetworkAccess
member.summary: Upgrade the server from localhost-only to all-interfaces (LAN accessible). Requests URL ACL via UAC if needed (one-time admin prompt). Starts mDNS discovery, claims the directory page, starts HTTPS redirect. Safe to call multiple times — only the first call triggers the upgrade.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.DisableNetworkAccess
member.summary: Downgrade the server from all-interfaces back to localhost-only. Stops mDNS, HTTPS redirect, directory listener, and rebinds to localhost. The browser tab on http://localhost/... keeps working across the switch. Safe to call when already in localhost mode (no-op).

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.RebindLocalhost
member.summary: Rebind the localhost listener (after network upgrade failure or disable).

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.Slugify(System.String)
member.summary: Sanitize a string for use in a URL path segment. Lowercase, spaces/underscores → hyphens, strip non-alphanumeric.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.BindLocalhostPrefix
member.summary: Bind a localhost-only HTTP prefix. Uses "localhost" hostname which has a built-in HTTP.sys reservation on modern Windows (no URL ACL / UAC required, even on port 80). Path: /grade/{machine}/{app}/ — auto-suffixes with -2, -3... if prefix is already taken.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.TrySetUrlAcl
member.summary: Try to set a URL ACL and firewall rule via a single UAC-elevated command. Sets ACL for /grade/ which covers all sub-paths (/grade/{machine}/{app}/). Adds a Windows Firewall inbound rule for port 80 (required for remote access). Shows the standard Windows admin consent popup. One-time, persists across reboots.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.EnsureFirewallRule
member.summary: Ensure Windows Firewall allows inbound TCP on our port. Queries the rule without elevation; only prompts UAC if it's missing.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.TryClaimDirectory
member.summary: Try to claim the directory page at /grade/ (first app on this machine wins). Uses a separate HttpListener — HTTP.sys routes by longest-prefix-match, so app-specific prefixes always take priority over the catch-all directory.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.StartHttpsRedirect
member.summary: Start a TLS listener on port 443 that redirects browsers to our HTTP port. Handles Chrome/Android HTTPS-First mode: browser tries https:// first, gets a valid TLS handshake + HTTP 301 redirect to http://, and loads the page.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.RequestBrowserOpen
member.summary: Request a browser open with a short delay. Called by ColorGradingInstance when autoOpenBrowser is true. Safe to call multiple times — only the first call triggers.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.RegisterInstance(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Immutable.ImmutableStack{VL.Core.UniqueId},System.Boolean,VL.OCIO.ColorGradingInstance,VL.OCIO.ColorCorrectionSettings,VL.OCIO.TonemapSettings,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Register a ColorGradingInstance with this service. Starts the server lazily on first call. Uses a stable ID (deterministic hash) as key; displayName is for UI only.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.UnregisterInstance(System.String)
member.summary: Unregister a ColorGradingInstance from this service.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.UpdateInstanceDisplayName(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Update the display name of an instance (when custom ID changes). Deduplicates display names by appending #N if needed.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.DisplayNameTaken(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Check if a display name is already used by another instance (caller must hold _instancesLock).

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.StackToKey(System.Collections.Immutable.ImmutableStack{VL.Core.UniqueId})
member.summary: Convert an ImmutableStack of UniqueIds to a stable string key for grouping. Instances sharing the same parent stack key share the same physical pin.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.NaturalCompare(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Natural sort comparison: "Test #2" before "Test #16", not after "Test #19". Compares strings character by character, treating consecutive digit sequences as numbers.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.UpdateInstanceDefaults(System.String,VL.OCIO.ColorCorrectionSettings,VL.OCIO.TonemapSettings,System.String)
member.summary: Update the default values for an instance (when Create pins change). CRITICAL: Create DEEP COPIES to prevent instances from sharing object references!

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.GetInstance(System.String)
member.summary: Get the state of a specific instance.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.SaveInstanceToJson(System.String,VL.OCIO.ColorCorrectionSettings,VL.OCIO.TonemapSettings,System.String)
member.summary: Save instance state to JSON file (for exported mode persistence).

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.LoadInstanceFromJson(System.String)
member.summary: Load instance state from JSON file (for exported mode startup).

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.ApplyInstanceState(System.String,System.String,VL.OCIO.ColorCorrectionSettings,VL.OCIO.TonemapSettings,System.String)
member.summary: Apply state changes to an instance using the appropriate persistence mechanism.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.ApplySettingsFromJson(System.String,VL.OCIO.ProjectSettings)
member.summary: Apply a complete ProjectSettings to an instance from external JSON input. Used by ColorGradingInstance for manual JSON I/O pins. Atomic: deep copies all fields, sets runtime state, and persists in a single operation.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.PersistInstanceToPin(VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.RegisteredInstance)
member.summary: Persist instance state to the "Settings" Create pin on the parent node via SetPinValue. Writes a dictionary of ALL instances sharing the same physical pin (same PinKey), keyed by stable instance ID. This supports multiple runtime instances from a looped node.

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.PinJsonOptions
member.summary: JSON options for pin persistence (indented for readability in the document).

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.BroadcastInstanceList
member.summary: Broadcast instance list to all connected clients (no LINQ).

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.SendInstanceListToClient(System.Net.WebSockets.WebSocket)
member.summary: Send instance list to a specific client (no LINQ).

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.BroadcastRedirect(System.String)
member.summary: Send a redirect message to all connected clients, telling them to navigate to a new URL. Blocks until all messages are sent (synchronous wait) so the caller can safely stop the current listener immediately after.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.RegisterSettingsBank(VL.OCIO.SettingsBank)
member.summary: Register a SettingsBank node to enable per-key settings management.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.UnregisterSettingsBank
member.summary: Unregister the SettingsBank (called on Dispose).

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.BroadcastBankStateAsync
member.summary: Broadcast current bank state to all connected clients (fire-and-forget).

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.GetPresetList
member.summary: Get sorted preset list (no LINQ).

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ColorGradingService.OpenFileDialogSync
member.summary: Opens a native Windows file dialog to select a DDS file. Must run on STA thread for Windows Forms dialogs.

member.name: T:VL.OCIO.HDRColorSpace
member.summary: Unified color space enum for HDR pipeline Covers all input/output/working spaces

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.HDRColorSpace.Linear_Rec709
member.summary: Linear Rec.709/sRGB primaries - VVVV default

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.HDRColorSpace.Linear_Rec2020
member.summary: Linear Rec.2020 primaries - HDR wide gamut

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.HDRColorSpace.ACEScg
member.summary: ACEScg - Linear AP1 primaries (ACES working space)

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.HDRColorSpace.ACEScc
member.summary: ACEScc - Log AP1 (color grading)

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.HDRColorSpace.ACEScct
member.summary: ACEScct - Log AP1 with toe (color grading)

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.HDRColorSpace.sRGB
member.summary: sRGB - Gamma encoded Rec.709

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.HDRColorSpace.PQ_Rec2020
member.summary: PQ (ST.2084) Rec.2020 - HDR10 output

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.HDRColorSpace.HLG_Rec2020
member.summary: HLG (BT.2100) Rec.2020 - Broadcast HDR

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.HDRColorSpace.scRGB
member.summary: scRGB - Linear extended (Windows HDR)

member.name: T:VL.OCIO.TonemapOperator
member.summary: Tonemapping operator selection. ACES 1.3/2.0 use full RRT+ODT (output-space-dependent). All other operators work in Linear Rec.709 (pipeline converts automatically).

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.TonemapOperator.None
member.summary: No tonemapping (passthrough)

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.TonemapOperator.ACES
member.summary: ACES (Fit) - Stephen Hill RRT+ODT approximation

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.TonemapOperator.ACES13
member.summary: ACES 1.3 - Full RRT + ODT (segmented spline tone curves)

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.TonemapOperator.ACES20
member.summary: ACES 2.0 - Daniele Evo tonescale (simplified, no Hellwig CAM)

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.TonemapOperator.AgX
member.summary: AgX - Troy Sobotka, exact analytical curve (Blender default)

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.TonemapOperator.GranTurismo
member.summary: Gran Turismo V1 / Uchimura (HDR-aware parametric curve)

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.TonemapOperator.Uncharted2
member.summary: Uncharted 2 / Hable filmic curve (game industry)

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.TonemapOperator.KhronosPBRNeutral
member.summary: Khronos PBR Neutral (e-commerce, product visualization)

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.TonemapOperator.Lottes
member.summary: Lottes - luma-based (Epic Games, The Witness)

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.TonemapOperator.Reinhard
member.summary: Reinhard simple

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.TonemapOperator.ReinhardExtended
member.summary: Reinhard Extended with white point

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.TonemapOperator.HejlBurgess
member.summary: Hejl-Burgess fast approximation

member.name: T:VL.OCIO.GradingSpace
member.summary: Internal grading space (where color math happens)

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.GradingSpace.Log
member.summary: Log (ACEScct) - colorist workflow, perceptually uniform (DaVinci style)

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.GradingSpace.Linear
member.summary: Linear (ACEScg) - VFX workflow, physically accurate (Nuke style)

member.name: T:VL.OCIO.GradeLogLevel
member.summary: Simple log levels for the color grading subsystem. Default is Warn — only errors and warnings are printed. Set to Info or Debug for startup diagnostics and troubleshooting.

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.GradeLogLevel.Off
member.summary: Show nothing.

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.GradeLogLevel.Error
member.summary: Errors and failures that need attention.

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.GradeLogLevel.Warn
member.summary: Warnings and non-critical issues (e.g. fallback paths).

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.GradeLogLevel.Info
member.summary: Key lifecycle events (startup, shutdown, URL, network).

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.GradeLogLevel.Debug
member.summary: Verbose diagnostics (instance register/unregister, presets, clients).

member.name: T:VL.OCIO.GradeLog
member.summary: Lightweight logger for the color grading subsystem. All output goes to Console with a [tag] prefix.

member.name: P:VL.OCIO.GradeLog.Level
member.summary: Current log level. Default is Warn (errors + warnings only). Change at runtime to increase verbosity for debugging.

member.name: T:VL.OCIO.DiscoveredServer
member.summary: Discovered color grading server on the network.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.DiscoveredServer.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.DateTime,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Discovered color grading server on the network.

member.name: T:VL.OCIO.MdnsDiscovery
member.summary: mDNS-based zero-config discovery for ColorGradingService. Registers the server on the local network, elects a leader that owns the "hdr.local" hostname, and discovers peer servers.

member.name: P:VL.OCIO.MdnsDiscovery.IsLeader
member.summary: True if this server owns the "hdr.local" hostname.

member.name: P:VL.OCIO.MdnsDiscovery.KnownServers
member.summary: All discovered servers on the network (including self).

member.name: P:VL.OCIO.MdnsDiscovery.HubUrl
member.summary: The hub URL for the leader, e.g. "http://hdr.local/" or with port.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.MdnsDiscovery.Start(System.UInt16,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Start mDNS registration and leader election. Call after the HTTP server is bound and the port is known.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.MdnsDiscovery.UpdateInstanceCount(System.Int32)
member.summary: Update the instance count for this server (called when instances change).

member.name: T:VL.OCIO.ProjectSettings
member.summary: Complete project settings including color correction and tonemap

member.name: P:VL.OCIO.ProjectSettings.InputFilePath
member.summary: Input file path (DDS texture, etc.)

member.name: P:VL.OCIO.ProjectSettings.ColorCorrection
member.summary: Color correction settings (ACEScc shader)

member.name: P:VL.OCIO.ProjectSettings.Tonemap
member.summary: Tonemap settings

member.name: P:VL.OCIO.ProjectSettings.PresetName
member.summary: Current preset name

member.name: P:VL.OCIO.ProjectSettings.Version
member.summary: Settings format version for forward-compatible JSON evolution. Bump this when the schema changes; add migration logic in FromJson().

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.ProjectSettings.JsonOptions
member.summary: JSON serialization options for consistent formatting

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ProjectSettings.ToJson
member.summary: Serialize to JSON string

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ProjectSettings.FromJson(System.String)
member.summary: Deserialize from JSON string

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ProjectSettings.SaveToFile(System.String)
member.summary: Save to file

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ProjectSettings.LoadFromFile(System.String)
member.summary: Load from file

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ProjectSettings.Reset
member.summary: Reset all settings to defaults

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ProjectSettings.Clone
member.summary: Create a deep copy

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ProjectSettings.CloneColorCorrection(VL.OCIO.ColorCorrectionSettings)
member.summary: Deep clone ColorCorrectionSettings to prevent shared references between instances. CRITICAL for multi-instance isolation!

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ProjectSettings.CloneTonemap(VL.OCIO.TonemapSettings)
member.summary: Deep clone TonemapSettings to prevent shared references between instances. CRITICAL for multi-instance isolation!

member.name: T:VL.OCIO.ServiceUiHelper
member.summary: Shared UI connectivity logic for nodes that expose the web UI. Handles browser auto-open, network publish toggle, URL and client count outputs. Used by both ColorGradingInstance and SettingsBank to guarantee identical behavior.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.ServiceUiHelper.Update(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Call once per frame from Update(). Handles network toggle edge detection and browser auto-open request (service guards against repeat opens internally).
member.param: Request browser open (safe to call every frame)
Toggle LAN accessibility with edge detection

member.name: T:VL.OCIO.SettingsBank
member.summary:
File-backed key/value store for color grading settings. One JSON file holds settings for every sequence/clip key.
Key switching is a PURE IN-MEMORY operation — zero disk I/O, zero allocations for existing keys. Designed for hard real-time environments (render cluster).
Disk writes happen ONLY when web UI edits settings (autoSave=true) or on explicit bank management operations.
All management (copy between keys, snapshots, friendly names, reset) is done via the web UI's Bank panel — not via vvvv pins.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.SettingsBank.Update(System.String@,System.Boolean@,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String}@,System.String@,System.Int32@,System.String@,VL.Lib.IO.Path,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: File-backed per-key settings management for multi-sequence workflows. Key switching is a pure in-memory operation — safe at render-cluster frame rates. Can be used standalone or alongside ColorGradingInstance nodes.
member.param: Active settings for the current key as JSON (for network distribution)
True for one frame when the current key's settings change (wire to ColorGradingInstance.ApplySettings)
All known keys in the bank
URL to reach the color grading web UI
Number of connected web UI clients
Last error, empty when ok
Path to the settings bank JSON file (loaded once, never touched at runtime)
Active sequence/clip key — switching is pure in-memory, zero disk I/O
When true, saves the file after every web UI edit or bank management operation
Base64 JPEG data URL for the current key's thumbnail (e.g. "data:image/jpeg;base64,..."). Recommended 192x108. Runtime-only, not saved to file.
When true, assigns thumbnailDataUrl to the current key. Use a bang so stale data from the previous key doesn't overwrite the new key on switch.
Automatically open the web UI in the default browser

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.SettingsBank.OnSettingsUpdated(VL.OCIO.ColorCorrectionSettings,VL.OCIO.TonemapSettings)
member.summary: Called by the service after any web UI settings update. Persists the new settings under the current key.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.SettingsBank.HandleBankMessage(System.String,System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Routes bank management WebSocket messages from the service.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.SettingsBank.GetBankStateJson
member.summary: Returns the current bank state as JSON for the web UI.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.SettingsBank.SaveToDisk
member.summary: Explicit save to disk (for bankSave message or when autoSave=false).

member.name: T:VL.OCIO.SettingsBankEntry
member.summary: One entry in the SettingsBank: active settings + named snapshots for a single key.

member.name: P:VL.OCIO.SettingsBankEntry.FriendlyName
member.summary: Optional human-readable label shown in the web UI instead of the raw key. Purely cosmetic — the key string is always the functional identifier. Null or empty means show the raw key.

member.name: P:VL.OCIO.SettingsBankEntry.Settings
member.summary: Active settings for this key.

member.name: P:VL.OCIO.SettingsBankEntry.Snapshots
member.summary: Named snapshots (save points) for this key.

member.name: T:VL.OCIO.SettingsBankFile
member.summary: The full SettingsBank file: version + dictionary of entries keyed by sequence key. Serialized as a single JSON file on disk.

member.name: P:VL.OCIO.SettingsBankFile.Version
member.summary: File format version for future migration.

member.name: P:VL.OCIO.SettingsBankFile.Entries
member.summary: All entries keyed by sequence/clip key.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.SettingsBankFile.ToJson
member.summary: Serialize to JSON string.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.SettingsBankFile.FromJson(System.String)
member.summary: Deserialize from JSON string. Returns null on failure.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.SettingsBankFile.LoadFromPath(System.String)
member.summary: Load from file path. Returns null if missing or corrupt.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.SettingsBankFile.SaveToPath(System.String)
member.summary: Atomic save: write to a temp file then rename over the target. This prevents partial writes from corrupting the file.

member.name: T:VL.OCIO.SettingsJsonUtils
member.summary: Utility functions for converting between JSON strings and settings structs. These are pure functions (no state) — they appear as simple nodes in vvvv. Use to manually manage settings outside the web UI workflow.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.SettingsJsonUtils.JsonToSettings(System.String)
member.summary: Parse a ProjectSettings JSON string into ColorCorrection and Tonemap settings. Returns defaults and valid=false if the JSON is empty or invalid.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.SettingsJsonUtils.SettingsToJson(VL.OCIO.ColorCorrectionSettings,VL.OCIO.TonemapSettings)
member.summary: Serialize ColorCorrection and Tonemap settings to a ProjectSettings JSON string. The resulting string can be passed over the network to a render cluster or fed back into a ColorGradingInstance via its settingsJson pin.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.SettingsJsonUtils.ThumbnailFit(Stride.Core.Mathematics.Int2@,Stride.Core.Mathematics.Int2@,Stride.Core.Mathematics.Int2@,Stride.Core.Mathematics.Int2,Stride.Core.Mathematics.Int2)
member.summary: Compute resize + crop parameters to fit any texture into a 256x144 thumbnail (16:9, cover mode). First resize uniformly so the shorter axis fits, then center-crop the excess.
member.param: Size to resize to before cropping
Top-left offset for the center crop
Final crop size (equals targetSize)
Source texture size in pixels
Desired thumbnail size (default 256x144)

member.name: T:VL.OCIO.TonemapSettings
member.summary: Settings for HDR tonemapping shader. Use Split() to extract individual values for vvvv shader pins.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.TonemapSettings.Split(VL.OCIO.HDRColorSpace@,VL.OCIO.TonemapOperator@,System.Single@,System.Single@,System.Single@,System.Single@,System.Single@,System.Single@,Stride.Graphics.PixelFormat@,Stride.Graphics.PixelFormat@,Stride.Graphics.PixelFormat)
member.summary: Split settings into individual out parameters matching shader input order. Outputs render format (RTV — how GPU writes) and view format (SRV — how downstream shaders sample). For sRGB output: render = UNorm (raw write), view = UNorm_SRgb (sampler decodes to linear). Wire a non-None PixelFormat into formatOverride to force both formats manually.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.TonemapSettings.SplitCombined(VL.OCIO.HDRColorSpace@,VL.OCIO.TonemapOperator@,System.Single@,System.Single@,System.Single@,System.Single@,System.Single@,System.Single@,Stride.Graphics.PixelFormat@,Stride.Graphics.PixelFormat@,Stride.Graphics.PixelFormat)
member.summary: Split for the combined HDRGrade_Tonemap shader. Outputs outputExposure (not exposure) to match the renamed shader pin that avoids conflict with HDRGrade's Exposure pin.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.TonemapSettings.DeduceFormats(VL.OCIO.HDRColorSpace)
member.summary: Deduce optimal render (RTV) and view (SRV) formats from the output color space. sRGB: shader writes gamma values → UNorm RTV (raw write), UNorm_SRgb SRV (sampler decodes to linear). All others: render = None (inherit input texture format), view = float16.

member.name: T:VL.OCIO.OCIOEnumVersion
member.summary: Increments whenever any OCIO dynamic enum entries change. Use for change detection.

member.name: T:VL.OCIO.OCIOConfigLoader
member.summary: Load an OCIO config from file. Each instance loads one config. Use multiple instances to load multiple configs into the dropdown.

member.name: T:VL.OCIO.OCIOConfigManager
member.summary: Central OCIO config switcher. Select active config from the dropdown. Outputs list of all available configs with their sources.

member.name: T:VL.OCIO.OCIOConfigService
member.summary: Per-app singleton managing OCIO config lifecycle. Holds active config, handles switching, file loading with dedup, config list.

member.name: P:VL.OCIO.OCIOConfigService.ConfigVersion
member.summary: Increments whenever configs are added or switched. Loaders compare against their last-seen version to know when to re-verify their enum entry.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.OCIOConfigService.EnsureDefaultLoaded
member.summary: Loads the default config if nothing has been loaded yet. Called lazily by nodes — NOT during assembly scan (where AppHost.Current isn't set).

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.OCIOConfigService.SwitchConfig(System.String)
member.summary: Switch to a config by its enum name. Returns error message or null on success.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.OCIOConfigService.LoadConfigFromFile(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Load a config from file and add it to the config enum. Returns assigned display name (may have #N suffix) or null on error.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.OCIOConfigService.EnsureFileConfigInEnum(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Re-adds a file config's enum entry if it went missing (e.g. after restart).

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.OCIOConfigService.GetConfigList
member.summary: Formatted list of all configs with sources. Active config marked with *.

member.name: T:VL.OCIO.OCIOInputTag
member.summary: Tag for input color space enum entries.

member.name: T:VL.OCIO.OCIOTargetTag
member.summary: Tag for output/display color space enum entries.

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.OCIOConfigUtils.CGConfig
member.summary: CG config - lean, VFX/games focused (27 colorspaces).

member.name: F:VL.OCIO.OCIOConfigUtils.StudioConfig
member.summary: Studio config - comprehensive with camera formats (57 colorspaces).

member.name: P:VL.OCIO.OCIOConfigUtils.ActiveConfig
member.summary: The currently active config. Updated by RefreshEnumsFrom(). All GPU resource methods use this — never stored in tags (avoids stale references).

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.OCIOConfigUtils.EnsureInitialized
member.summary: Ensures a default config is loaded and enums are populated. Uses direct static init — no AppHost required. The OCIOConfigService (via ProcessNodes) can switch configs later.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.OCIOConfigUtils.RefreshEnumsFrom(OCIOSharpCLI.OCIOConfig)
member.summary: Refresh all dynamic enums from a config. Called by OCIOConfigService on switch. Builds all entries locally, then swaps each enum dict in one shot (3 triggers total).

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.OCIOConfigUtils.GetBuiltinConfigNames
member.summary: Get list of available built-in config names.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.OCIOConfigUtils.GetGPUResources(VL.OCIO.OCIOColorSpaceEnum,VL.OCIO.OCIOColorSpaceEnum,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Get GPU resources for ColorSpace to ColorSpace transform.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.OCIOConfigUtils.GetGPUResources(VL.OCIO.OCIOColorSpaceEnum,VL.OCIO.OCIODisplayViewEnum,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Get GPU resources for ColorSpace to Display/View transform.

member.name: M:VL.OCIO.OCIOConfigUtils.GetDisplayViewTransformResources(VL.OCIO.OCIOColorSpaceEnum,VL.OCIO.OCIODisplayViewEnum,VL.OCIO.OCIOLookEnum,System.Boolean)
member.summary: DisplayViewTransform with optional Look: input → look → view → display (single shader).
